sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (event_date DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY event_date;
UPDATE test_dates SET event_date = toDateTime('2025-05-05 15:45:00') WHERE toYear(event_date) = 2023;
SELECT toYear(event_date) AS event_year FROM test_dates WHERE event_date IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_dates WHERE toYear(event_date) > 2020;
